$comment: keemakr Marketplace submission for the kee-hello agent. This is the EntrySubmission the platform's registerEntry() ingests (see keemakr-core src/lib/marketplace/types.ts). Installing it for a tenant creates the 'hello' department + its single agent. It declares NO dependencies, so it installs instantly (no pending_deps step).
description: A tiny demo agent that greets and shouts text. The smallest possible keemakr Marketplace entry: one root agent, one tool, zero dependencies — instant install.
author: keemakr
changelog: Remove the Hunter.io find-email tool and its connection dependency — kee-hello is now a pure shout-only, zero-dependency demo.

department.label: Hello
department.description: A one-agent demo department that greets and shouts text.

agents.description: Greets and shouts text via the shout tool. No connections, no database, no subagents.
